keyFeatures.en: Generates custom tattoo designs based on user input
keyFeatures.zh: 根据用户输入生成定制纹身设计

description.en: Unlimited design suggestions, but limited to personal use only
description.zh: 无限的设计建议，但仅限个人使用

weaknesses.en: Limited to personal use only, no commercial use allowed
weaknesses.zh: 仅限个人使用，不允许商业使用

targetAudience.en: Individuals looking to design their own tattoos
targetAudience.zh: 寻找设计自己纹身的个人

positioning.en: AI-driven tattoo design tool for personal use
positioning.zh: 个人使用的AI驱动纹身设计工具
